heading: Repealed. ,Apr. 29, 1950, ch. 134, § 464 Stat. 93
label: 768, 769 Repealed. ,Apr. 29, 1950, ch. 134, § 464 Stat. 93
notes: Section 768, R.S. § 2408, authorized Secretary of the Interior to vary lines of subdivisions from a rectangular form to suit the circumstances of the country in extending the surveys of public lands in Nevada. See .section 770 of this title
Section 769, R.S. § 2409, authorized Secretary of the Interior to continue geodetic method of survey in Oregon and California.
